mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM dish_category ORDER BY id

SELECT id, cat_id AS catId, name, price, stock, picture, description, d.is_deleted AS isDeleted, COALESCE(s.soldCount, 0) AS soldCount FROM dish d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.dish_id, SUM(oi.count) AS soldCount FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.pay_status = 1 AND oi.item_status = 1 GROUP BY oi.dish_id ) s ON s.dish_id = d.id WHERE d.is_deleted = 0

SELECT d.id, d.cat_id AS catId, d.name, d.price, d.stock, d.picture, d.description, d.is_deleted AS isDeleted, COALESCE(s.soldCount, 0) AS soldCount FROM dish d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.dish_id, SUM(oi.count) AS soldCount FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.pay_status = 1 AND oi.item_status = 1 GROUP BY oi.dish_id ) s ON s.dish_id = d.id ORDER BY d.is_deleted, d.id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dish ( cat_id, name, price, stock, picture, description, is_deleted )
VALUES ( #{catId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{picture}, #{description}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE dish
SET
cat_id=#{catId}, name=#{name}, price=#{price}, stock=#{stock}, picture=#{picture}, description=#{description}
WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0

UPDATE dish
SET is_deleted=1
WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0
UPDATE dish SET is_deleted=0 WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=1
UPDATE dish SET stock=#{stock} WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0
UPDATE dish SET stock=stock+#{count} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
cat_id AS catId,
name,
price,
stock,
picture,
description,
is_deleted AS isDeleted
FROM dish
WHERE is_deleted=0
AND stock < 10
